evals.prompt: Ship this branch as a PR against main. It should be clean enough for a human to merge, and do not merge it yourself.
evals.expected_output: The skill prepares an ignored ship-pr-dev run directory, collects branch context, verifies branch/base state with main...HEAD, runs relevant local checks, runs a read-only review board for non-trivial diffs, runs review-code-dev as an independent gate, fixes confirmed blockers within loop caps, commits with commitzen, pushes normally, creates or updates a PR, monitors CI to green when accessible, and returns the PR URL plus latest commit, verification, CI, and review summaries.

evals.prompt: Clean this up locally before PR, but don't push yet. I want to know whether it's merge-ready.
evals.expected_output: The skill runs local cleanup, verification, and review-code-dev, records artifacts, avoids push/PR creation, and returns a local handoff stating whether the branch is merge-ready and what remains.

evals.prompt: Update the existing PR with the fixes from review feedback and make sure everything is green before handing it back.
evals.expected_output: The skill reads the current PR or branch context, applies scoped fixes only, reruns relevant checks, reruns review-code-dev when source changed, pushes normal commits, updates the PR body, waits for CI on the latest commit, investigates logs for failures, and reports any unresolved human decisions.

evals.prompt: Make a PR for this auth and data export change. Be paranoid about tests and review because it touches permissions.
evals.expected_output: The skill selects a deep review-code-dev gate, runs security/data/export-relevant verification, fixes P0/P1/P2 findings, records skipped checks with reasons, and blocks handoff if permission behavior lacks adequate tests or review evidence.

evals.prompt: Create a PR, but there are some unrelated local edits I don't want included.
evals.expected_output: The skill identifies unrelated dirty files, stages only intentional files, refuses broad staging, asks or stops if separation is unsafe, and never commits unrelated user work.

evals.prompt: Ship this frontend branch. It changes React pages, Tailwind styles, and form submit behavior, so I want the visual and UX pass to be strict.
evals.expected_output: The skill detects a frontend diff, routes frontend scrutiny through review-code-dev frontend mode before PR handoff, checks accessibility/responsive/loading/error/double-submit risks through that gate, fixes blocking frontend findings, reruns affected frontend verification, then runs final review-code-dev and CI before calling the PR ready.

evals.prompt: The PR is open but CI is red. Please get it to ready-to-merge without merging.
evals.expected_output: The skill finds the PR and latest pushed SHA, reads failing CI logs, identifies the first causal error, fixes within scope, runs corresponding local validation, commits and pushes targeted fixes, loops until CI is green or the same check fails after 3 distinct attempts, and never disables checks or bypasses hooks.
